---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What are you trying to do that MuseLM doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. Reference the [roadmap](../../docs/ROADMAP.md) if it fits an existing milestone.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Willing to contribute?**
Would you like to implement this yourself? (We're happy to guide.)
